visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a zebra-patterned bucket hat and a light-colored, ruffled dress stands in a warehouse-style retail aisle. She holds a small blue plush dog toy in her right hand and points with her left index finger at a price tag indicating a discount from 429 to 197. The background consists of large wooden pallets stacked with boxed merchandise under bright industrial lighting. (2) The woman reaches for a large, green-and-yellow boxed set of dog toys labeled 'ZEUS FITNESS' and holds it up with both hands towards the camera. She has a wide, excited smile and makes direct eye contact. A large Costco logo is superimposed at the top of the frame. (3) She continues to showcase the box, which contains a frisbee and a ball, while talking animatedly. She gestures with the product, tilting it to show different angles. The background remains consistent with high shelves and stacked goods typical of a wholesale store.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 寵物玩具. (2) [Slogan]: 這個買完之後啊. [Slogan]: 旁邊這個從429元折到197元. (3) [Variety]: 半價半價. (4) [Slogan]: 一樣是漂浮玩具. (5) [Slogan]: 你讓大狗狗把飛盤丟到水裡. [Variety]: 它們會超嗨的. (6) [Variety]: 超便宜!. (7) [Slogan]: 夏天很多大狗狗會去玩游泳池. [Variety]: 超適合. (8) [Variety]: 完美組合. (9) [Slogan]: 你丟玩具進去. [Slogan]: 給他撿.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black and white zebra-print bucket hat and a pale beige/pink ruffled dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A wholesale warehouse interior with high-reaching industrial shelving, wooden pallets, and bulk-packaged items stacked high in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking with high arousal and a cheerful tone in Traditional Chinese, describing a shopping deal. An upbeat acoustic pop track with bright guitar strumming and a steady rhythmic beat plays in the background. The ambient sound includes subtle warehouse echoes. (2) A synthesized 'bubble pop' sound effect triggers simultaneously with the appearance of colorful text on screen. The speaker's pitch rises as she emphasizes the price reduction, maintaining a rapid and energetic speech rate. (3) A metallic 'ding' SFX is heard as the speaker points out specific toy features. The musical background remains constant, providing a joyful and lighthearted atmosphere. The overall audio mix is clean with the vocal track prominently layered over the background music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Price Comparison -> Product Feature -> Usage Context
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform viewers of a significant price discount on dog toys at Costco, using an energetic personal recommendation style to encourage summer-themed pet product purchases.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically showcases and recommends the 'Zeus' brand dog toys found at Costco, highlighting the value of the deal.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media content with dense variety-style captions and bright, commercial-grade audio design.
